name: create_cluster_configuration
full_help:
create_cluster_configuration

Description: 
Creates a cluster configuration

Syntax: 
create_cluster_configuration  -submit_cmd <arg> -kill_cmd <arg>
                              [-monitor_cmd <arg>] [-job_id_proc <arg>]
                              [-job_id_tcl <arg>] -type <arg> [-force] [-quiet]
                              [-verbose] <name>

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  -submit_cmd     Submit command of cluster configuration
  -kill_cmd       Kill command of cluster configuration
  [-monitor_cmd]  Monitor command of cluster configuration
  [-job_id_proc]  Proc name to parse job Id
  [-job_id_tcl]   path to the tcl file contatining the proc
  -type           Type of cluster configuration
  [-force]        Force to overwrite a cluster configuration if it already 
                  exists.
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>          Name of cluster configuration

Categories: 
cluster_configuration

arguments.description: Proc name to parse job Id
path to the tcl file contatining the proc
Force to overwrite a cluster configuration if it already exists.
